problem_text_cn: 光滑水平面AB与倾角θ的光滑斜面BC通过半径r的小圆弧B连接，全长l的柔软绳子静止在AB上，右端与B齐。求下滑过程中绳子与B接触处的张力、B对绳子的支持力，及绳子脱离B时的位置。
problem_text_en: A smooth horizontal surface AB is connected to a smooth inclined plane BC of angle θ via a small arc B of radius r. A soft rope of total length l is at rest on AB, with its right end aligned with B. Find the tension at the contact point between the rope and B during the sliding process, the support force of B on the rope, and the position of the rope when it detaches from B.
problem_solution_cn: （1）绳子速度与加速度：- 机械能守恒得v=(l-x)√(gsinθ/l)，加速度a=(l-x)gsinθ/l（x为绳子左端到B的距离）。（2）张力计算：- 水平段与斜面段张力相等，T=λx(l-x)gsinθ/l（λ为质量线密度），x=l/2时T最大。（3）支持力与脱离条件：- 支持力N=λgsinθ√[2(1-cosθ)](l-x)(2x-l)，当x=l/2时N=0，绳子脱离B。
problem_solution_en: （1）Velocity and acceleration of the rope：- Conservation of mechanical energy gives v=(l-x)√(gsinθ/l)，acceleration a=(l-x)gsinθ/l（x is the distance from the left end of the rope to B）。（2）Tension calculation：- The tension in the horizontal segment is equal to that in the inclined segment, T=λx(l-x)gsinθ/l（λ is the mass linear density），T is maximum when x=l/2。（3）Support force and detachment condition：- Support force N=λgsinθ√[2(1-cosθ)](l-x)(2x-l)，when x=l/2，N=0，the rope detaches from B。
problem_answer: 张力$T= rac{\lambda x(l-x) g \sin		heta}{l}{$}；支持力$N= rac{\lambda g \sin		heta \sqrt{2(1-\cos		heta)}{(}l-x)(2x-l)}{l}$；绳子在$x= rac{l}{2}{$}时脱离B
